arcane.description: Manipulates raw Arcane magic, destroying enemies with overwhelming power. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

left.name: Spellslinger
left.description: Mastering the inherently unstable nature of magic allows Spellslingers to splinter their magic, creating powerful and volatile new effects.

right.name: Sunfury
right.description: By embracing arcane flames, Sunfury mages enhance their most devastating incantations, even calling on the aid of a spellfire phoenix.

nodes.name: Spellsteal
nodes.description: Steals a beneficial magic effect from the target. This effect lasts a maximum of 2 minutes.

nodes.name: Ice Cold
nodes.description: Ice Block now reduces all damage taken by 70% for 6 seconds but no longer grants Immunity, prevents movement, attacks, or casting spells. Does not incur the Global Cooldown.

nodes.name: Permafrost Bauble
nodes.description: The cooldown of Ice Block and Ice Cold are reduced by 30 seconds.

choices.name: Freezing Cold
choices.description:
Enemies hit by Cone of Cold are frozen in place for 5 seconds instead of snared.

When your roots expire or are dispelled, your target is snared by 80%, decaying over 3 seconds.

choices.name: Ice Nova
choices.description: Causes a whirl of icy wind around the enemy, dealing 16560 Frost damage to the target and all other enemies within 8 yds, freezing them in place for 2 seconds. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Ring of Frost
choices.description:
Summons a Ring of Frost for 10 seconds at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are incapacitated for 10 seconds. Limit 10 targets.

When the incapacitate expires, enemies are slowed by 65% for 4 seconds.

choices.name: Mass Polymorph
choices.description:
Transforms all enemies within 10 yards into sheep, wandering around incapacitated for 15 seconds. While affected, the victims cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters.

nodes.name: Barrier Diffusion
nodes.description: When your Barrier is removed, reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Mass Invisibility
nodes.description:
You and your allies within 40 yards instantly become invisible for 12 seconds. Taking any action will cancel the effect.



[Does not affect allies in combat.]

choices.name: Spatial Manipulation
choices.description: Blink gains an additional charge.

choices.name: Reflection
choices.description:
After casting Blink, it is replaced with Reflection for 8 seconds.

Reflection
Teleports you back to where you last Blinked. Castable while casting and unaffected by the global cooldown.

nodes.name: Flow of Time
nodes.description: The cooldowns of Blink and Shimmer are reduced by 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Tome of Antonidas
nodes.description: Increases Haste by 2%.

nodes.name: Energized Barriers
nodes.description: Casting your barrier removes all snare effects.

nodes.name: Master of Time
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Alter Time by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Quick Witted
nodes.description: Counterspell's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds.

choices.name: Shimmer
choices.description: Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way. Unaffected by the global cooldown and castable while casting.

choices.name: Improved Blink
choices.description: Blink's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Frost Conditioning
nodes.description: Hypothermia's duration is reduced by 10 seconds.

choices.name: Improved Frost Nova
choices.description: Frost Nova duration is increased by 2 seconds.

choices.name: Ice Ward
choices.description: Frost Nova now has 2 charges.

nodes.name: Incantation of Swiftness
nodes.description: Invisibility increases your movement speed by 20% for 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Arcane Warding
nodes.description: Reduces magic damage taken by 4%.

nodes.name: Alter Time
nodes.description: Alters the fabric of time, returning you to your current location and health when cast a second time, or after 10 seconds. Effect negated by long distance or death.

nodes.name: Remove Curse
nodes.description: Removes all Curses from a friendly target.

nodes.name: Prismatic Barrier
nodes.description:
Shields you with an arcane force, absorbing 198000 damage and reducing magic damage taken by 15% for 60 seconds.

The duration of harmful Magic effects against you is reduced by 25%.

nodes.name: Ice Block
nodes.description:
Encases you in a block of ice, protecting you from all attacks and damage for 10 seconds, but during that time you cannot attack, move, or cast spells.

Causes Hypothermia, preventing you from recasting Ice Block for 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Winter's Protection
nodes.description: The cooldown of Ice Block is reduced by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Mirror Image
nodes.description:
Creates 3 copies of you nearby for 15 seconds, which cast spells and attack your enemies. While active, you generate significantly reduced threat.

Taking direct damage will cause one of your images to dissipate

nodes.name: Captured Thoughts
nodes.description: The duration of Clearcasting is increased by 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Tome of Rhonin
nodes.description: Increases Critical Strike chance by 2%.

nodes.name: Time Manipulation
nodes.description: The cooldown of your loss of control spells are reduced by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Greater Invisibility
nodes.description: Makes you invisible and untargetable for 20 seconds, removing all threat. Any action taken cancels this effect.

choices.name: Dragon's Breath
choices.description: Enemies in a 12 yd cone in front of you take 8038 Fire damage and are disoriented for 4 seconds. Damage will cancel the effect.

choices.name: Supernova
choices.description: Pulses arcane energy around the target enemy or ally, dealing 4140 Arcane damage to all enemies within 8 yds, and knocking them upward. A primary enemy target will take 100% increased damage.

choices.name: Time Walk
choices.description: Alter Time resets the cooldown of Blink and Shimmer when you return to your original location.

choices.name: Temporal Realignment
choices.description: Upon dropping below 25% health, your past self corrects your timeline, casting Alter Time and instantly returning 50% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Charm of Medivh
nodes.description: Your Mastery is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Charm of Aegwynn
nodes.description: The critical strike damage of your spells is  increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Master of Escape
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Invisibility by 60 seconds.

nodes.name: Inspired Intellect
nodes.description: Arcane Intellect grants you an additional 2% Intellect.

nodes.name: Overflowing Energy
nodes.description:
Each time your Arcane Barrage fails to critically strike, it gains 10% increased critical strike chance.

Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes.

nodes.name: Improved Conjuration
nodes.description: Mirror Image's cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Improved Prismatic Barrier
nodes.description: Prismatic Barrier further reduces magical damage taken by an additional 10% and duration of harmful Magic effects by 15%.

nodes.name: Improved Remove Curse
nodes.description: Casting Remove Curse on a friendly target also casts it on yourself, but its cooldown is increased by 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Improved Counterspell
nodes.description: Counterspell prevents casting for an additional 1 second.

nodes.name: Mana Confluence
nodes.description: Your mana costs are reduced by 5%.

nodes.name: Brainstorm
nodes.description: Gaining Clearcasting increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 seconds. Multiple instances may overlap.

nodes.name: Improved Spellsteal
nodes.description: Spellsteal repeats its effect after 4 seconds, but it now has a cooldown of 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Orb Mastery
nodes.description:
Casting Arcane Orb while you have Clearcasting causes you to fire 2 additional Arcane Orbs at 100% effectiveness.

Casting Arcane Orb now consumes Clearcasting.

nodes.name: Arcane Pulse
nodes.description:
A pulse of Arcane magic erupts from underneath your target, dealing 10920 Arcane damage to all enemies within 2 yds. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Each Arcane Charge increases damage by 60%, radius by 2 yds, and mana cost by 100%.

Generates 1 Arcane Charge.

nodes.name: Mana Bomb
nodes.description: Arcane Surge's damage is increased by an additional 50% based on your mana spent.

nodes.name: Energized Familiar
nodes.description:
During Arcane Surge, your Familiar fires 4 bolts instead of 1.

Damage from your Arcane Familiar has a 6% chance to grant you up to 2% of your maximum mana.

nodes.name: Improved Clearcasting
nodes.description: Clearcasting can stack up to 2 additional times.

nodes.name: Intuition
nodes.description: Upon reaching maximum stacks of Arcane Salvo, your next Arcane Barrage deals 25% increased damage.

nodes.name: Arcane Surge
nodes.description:
Expend all of your current mana to annihilate your enemy target and nearby enemies for up to 89280 Arcane damage based on Mana spent. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

For the next 15 seconds, your Mana regeneration is increased by 425% and spell damage is increased by 35%.

Generates Clearcasting.

nodes.name: Focusing Crystal
nodes.description: Each wave of Arcane Missiles has a 50% chance to grant 1 additional stack of Arcane Salvo.

nodes.name: Impetus
nodes.description: Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse generate an additional Arcane Charge.

choices.name: Evocation
choices.description: Increases your mana regeneration by 1500% for 3 seconds.

choices.name: Mana Adept
choices.description: Arcane Barrage grants you 2% of your maximum mana per Arcane Charge spent.

choices.name: Presence of Mind
choices.description: Causes your next 2 Arcane Blasts to be instant cast.

choices.name: Slipstream
choices.description: Arcane Missiles and Evocation can now be channeled while moving.

nodes.name: Reverberate
nodes.description: Arcane Pulse has a 50% chance to repeat its explosion at 30% effectiveness.

choices.name: Aegwynn's Technique
choices.description: Casting Touch of the Magi grants Clearcasting.

choices.name: Arcane Echo
choices.description: Direct damage you deal to enemies affected by Touch of the Magi, causes an explosion that deals 1200 Arcane damage to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Arcane Missiles
nodes.description:
Requires Clearcasting
Launches 5 waves of Arcane Missiles at the enemy over 2.5 seconds, causing a total of 47036 Arcane damage.

nodes.name: Touch of the Magi
nodes.description:
Applies Touch of the Magi to your current target, accumulating 20% of the damage you deal to the target for 12 seconds, and then exploding for that amount of Arcane damage to the target and reduced damage to all nearby enemies.

Generates 4 Arcane Charges.

nodes.name: Arcane Familiar
nodes.description: Casting Arcane Intellect summons a Familiar that attacks your enemies and increases your maximum mana by 10% for 1 hour.

nodes.name: Enlightened
nodes.description:
Arcane damage dealt is increased based on your current mana, up to 6% at full mana.

Mana Regen is increased based on your current mana, up to 20% when out of mana.

nodes.name: Arcing Cleave
nodes.description: For each Arcane Charge, Arcane Barrage hits 1 additional nearby target for 40% damage.

choices.name: High Voltage
choices.description:
Each wave of Arcane Missiles has a 50% chance to grant you 1 Arcane Charge.

Arcane Missiles damage increased by 20%.

choices.name: Charged Missiles
choices.description: Each wave of Arcane Missiles will consume an Arcane Charge to increase its damage by 40%.

nodes.name: Amplification
nodes.description: Arcane Missiles fires 2 additional missiles.

nodes.name: Orb Barrage
nodes.description: Arcane Barrage has a 4% chance per stack of Arcane Salvo to launch an Arcane Orb in front of you at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Charged Orb
nodes.description: Arcane Orb gains 1 additional charge. Arcane Orb damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Overflowing Insight
nodes.description: The damage of Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse are increased by 15%, but their mana costs are increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Prodigious Savant
nodes.description: Arcane Charges increase the damage of Arcane Blast, Arcane Pulse, and Arcane Barrage by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Arcane Orb
nodes.description:
Launches an Arcane Orb forward from your position, traveling up to 40 yds, dealing 29184 Arcane damage to enemies it passes through.

Grants 1 Arcane Charge when cast and every time it deals damage.

nodes.name: Aether Attunement
nodes.description: Arcane Missiles now damages 2 additional targets at 50% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Consortium's Bauble
nodes.description: Reduces Arcane Blast's mana cost by 5% and increases its damage by 8%.

nodes.name: Arcane Singularity
nodes.description:
Arcane Salvo damage bonus increased by 2%.

Arcane Salvo:
Increases the damage of your next Arcane Barrage by 3%.

nodes.name: Concentrated Power
nodes.description: Arcane Missiles channels 20% faster.

nodes.name: Arcane Salvo
nodes.description: Each wave of Arcane Missiles increases the damage of Arcane Barrage by 3%, up to 60%.

nodes.name: Resonance
nodes.description: Arcane Barrage deals 8% increased damage per target it hits beyond the first.

nodes.name: Illuminated Thoughts
nodes.description: Clearcasting has a 3% increased chance to proc.

nodes.name: Eureka
nodes.description: When a spell consumes Clearcasting, its damage is increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Expanded Mind
nodes.description:
Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Pulse grants 2 stacks of Arcane Salvo.

Casting Arcane Orb grants 2 stacks of Arcane Salvo.

nodes.name: Overpowered Missiles
nodes.description: Gaining Clearcasting has a 25% chance to cause your next Arcane Missiles to be Overpowered, causing it to deal 100% increased damage, generate maximum stacks of Arcane Salvo, and strike 3 additional targets at 50% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Arcane Tempo
nodes.description: Your Haste is increased by 2%.

ranks.description: Touch of the Magi increases the damage your target receives from you by 15%.

Arcane Charges further increase the damage of Arcane Blast, Arcane Pulse, and Arcane Barrage by 15%.

Arcane Missiles damage increased by 10%.

When Touch of the Magi explodes, it leaves behind a pulsing rune on its target, dealing 75% of its damage over 6 seconds to nearby enemies. Damage is increased by 50% on your initial Touch of the Magi target.

nodes.name: Splinterstorm
nodes.description:
Casting Arcane Surge generates 8 Arcane Splinters.

During Arcane Surge, your chance to conjure an additional Arcane Splinter is increased to 100%.

nodes.name: Spellfrost Teachings
nodes.description: Direct damage from Arcane Splinters reduces the cooldown of Arcane Orb by 0.25 second.

nodes.name: Controlled Instincts
nodes.description: 40% of the direct damage dealt by an Arcane Splinter is also dealt to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Signature Spell
nodes.description:
Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse damage increased by 15%.

Casting Touch of the Magi conjures 4 Arcane Splinters.

nodes.name: Archmage's Wrath
nodes.description:
Arcane Surge damage increased by 30%.

Your chance to gain Clearcasting is increased by 3%.

choices.name: Slippery Slinging
choices.description: You have 40% increased movement speed during Alter Time.

choices.name: Look Again
choices.description: While in combat, Blink summons a Mirror Image at your previous location.

choices.name: Reactive Barrier
choices.description:
Your Prismatic Barrier can absorb up to 25% more damage based on your missing Health.

Max effectiveness when under 25% health.

choices.name: Phantasmal Image
choices.description: Your Mirror Image summons 1 extra clone.

nodes.name: Splintering Orbs
nodes.description:
Enemies damaged by your Arcane Orb conjure 2 Arcane Splinters, up to 4.

Arcane Orb damage is increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Augury Abounds
nodes.description: Conjuring one or more Arcane Splinters has a 10% chance to conjure a burst of 8 Arcane Splinters.

nodes.name: Force of Will
nodes.description: Casting Arcane Barrage conjures an Arcane Splinter for every 5 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed.

nodes.name: Splintering Sorcery
nodes.description:
Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Pulse conjures an Arcane Splinter.

Arcane Splinter:
Conjure raw Arcane magic into a sharp projectile that deals 5238 Arcane damage.

[
Frost Splinter:
Conjure raw Frost magic into a sharp projectile that deals 5436 Frost damage.
]

nodes.name: Polished Focus
nodes.description:
Casting Arcane Barrage while at 20 or more Arcane Salvo stacks refunds 5 Arcane Salvo stacks.

Arcane Barrage damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Infused Splinters
nodes.description:
Direct damage from Arcane Splinters have a 25% chance to grant 1 stack Arcane Salvo.

Arcane Salvo
Increases the damage of your next Arcane Barrage by 3%.

choices.name: Attuned Familiar
choices.description: Your Arcane Familiar has a 50% chance to conjure a Splinter alongside its Arcane Assault.

choices.name: Shifting Shards
choices.description: Gaining Clearcasting conjures 2 Arcane Splinters.

nodes.name: Ashes of Inspiration
nodes.description:
When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it grants you Lesser Time Warp for 6 seconds.

Lesser Time Warp
Warp the flow of time, increasing your haste by 15%.

nodes.name: Burden of Power
nodes.description:
Arcane Blast damage increased by 25%.

Arcane Pulse damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Codex of the Sunstriders
nodes.description:
When your Arcane Phoenix is summoned, it consumes all your Spellfire Spheres.

Each Sphere consumed increases your spell damage during Arcane Surge by 1% and causes your Arcane Phoenix to cast an exceptional Arcane or Fire spell over its duration.

nodes.name: Memory of Al'ar
nodes.description:
During Arcane Surge, you gain twice as many stacks of Mana Cascade.

When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it empowers you, granting Arcane Soul for 4 seconds.

Arcane Soul:
Arcane Barrage grants Clearcasting and generates 4 Arcane Charges.

Each cast of Arcane Barrage grants 5 stacks of Arcane Salvo and casting Arcane Barrage does not consume Arcane Salvo.

nodes.name: Spellfire Spheres
nodes.description:
Casting a damaging spell has a 12% chance to conjure a Spellfire Sphere.

While you're out of combat, you will slowly conjure Spellfire Spheres over time.

Spellfire Sphere
Increases your spell damage by 1%. Stacks up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Rondurmancy
nodes.description: Spellfire Spheres can now stack up to 5 times.

choices.name: Merely a Setback
choices.description: The bonuses provided by your Barrier spells persist an additional 8 seconds after your Barrier is removed.

choices.name: Time Twist
choices.description: The cooldown of Alter Time is reduced by 10 seconds.

choices.name: Savor the Moment
choices.description: When you cast Arcane Surge, its duration is extended by 0.4 second for each Spellfire Sphere you have, up to 2 seconds.

choices.name: Sunfury Execution
choices.description: Arcane Barrage deals 5% increased damage to enemies affected by your Touch of the Magi.

choices.name: Lessons in Debilitation
choices.description: Your Arcane Phoenix has picked up a few tricks, and will Spellsteal when it is summoned and when it expires.

choices.name: Explosive Potential
choices.description: After casting Arcane Surge, your next Blink will cause a Blast Wave at your previous location, dealing 6520 Fire damage, knocking enemies back 8 yds, and slowing them by 70% for 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Invocation: Arcane Phoenix
nodes.description:
When you cast Arcane Surge, summon an Arcane Phoenix to aid you in battle.

Arcane Phoenix
Your Arcane Phoenix aids you for the duration of your Arcane Surge, casting random Arcane and Fire spells.

nodes.name: Mana Cascade
nodes.description: Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Barrage grants you 0.5% Haste for 10 seconds1. Stacks up to 10 times. Multiple instances may overlap.

nodes.name: Spellfire Salvo
nodes.description:
Arcane Salvo can stack 5 additional times.

Meteorite damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Pyrocosm
nodes.description:
Each wave of Arcane Missiles has a 10% chance to summon a Meteorite.

When a Meteorite lands, you have a 5% chance to gain Clearcasting.

nodes.name: Glorious Incandescence
nodes.description:
Arcane Barrage summons 1 Meteor for every 6 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed.

Meteorite
Calls down a meteorite which lands at the target location after 3 seconds, dealing 12240 Fire damage to all enemies hit, reduced beyond 8 targets.

fire.description: Focuses the pure essence of Fire magic, assaulting enemies with combustive flames. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

left.name: Frostfire
left.description: Frostfire mages take the reins of seemingly incompatible elemental forces. By mastering the opposing forces, they enhance their elemental attacks and can even combine them for more power.

right.name: Sunfury
right.description: By embracing arcane flames, Sunfury mages enhance their most devastating incantations, even calling on the aid of a spellfire phoenix.

nodes.description: Steals a beneficial magic effect from the target. This effect lasts a maximum of 2 minutes.

nodes.description: Removes all Curses from a friendly target.

nodes.description:
Shields you in flame, absorbing 198000 damage for 60 seconds.

Melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take 1724 Fire damage.

nodes.name: Improved Blazing Barrier
nodes.description: Blazing Barrier's damage is increased by 200% and it now cauterizes your wounds, healing you for 15% of the damage it absorbs.

nodes.name: Charm of Medivh
nodes.description: Your Mastery is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Charm of Aegwynn
nodes.description: The critical strike damage of your spells is  increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Master of Escape
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Invisibility by 60 seconds.

nodes.name: Inspired Intellect
nodes.description: Arcane Intellect grants you an additional 2% Intellect.

nodes.name: Overflowing Energy
nodes.description:
Each time your Fireball fails to critically strike, it gains 20% increased critical strike chance.

Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes.

nodes.name: Improved Conjuration
nodes.description: Mirror Image's cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Improved Remove Curse
nodes.description: Casting Remove Curse on a friendly target also casts it on yourself, but its cooldown is increased by 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Improved Counterspell
nodes.description: Counterspell prevents casting for an additional 1 second.

nodes.name: Mana Confluence
nodes.description: Your mana costs are reduced by 5%.

nodes.name: Brainstorm
nodes.description: Gaining Hot Streak increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 seconds. Multiple instances may overlap.

nodes.name: Improved Spellsteal
nodes.description: Spellsteal repeats its effect after 4 seconds, but it now has a cooldown of 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Fire Blast
nodes.description:
Blasts the enemy, critically striking for 23670 Fire damage.

Castable while casting other spells.

nodes.name: Combustion
nodes.description:
Engulfs you in flames for 10 seconds, increasing your spells' critical strike chance by 100%.

Castable while casting other spells.

nodes.name: Pyroblast
nodes.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes 66654 Fire damage.

nodes.name: Feel the Burn
nodes.description: Fire Blast increases your mastery by 2% for 4 seconds. Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: Fire's Ire
nodes.description:
Your spell critical strike chance is increased by 2.5%.

Combustion increases your critical strike damage by 2.5%.

choices.name: Slow Burn
choices.description:
Combustion grants mastery equal to 75% of your Critical Strike stat.

Combustion causes your spells to apply Ignite at 15% increased effectiveness.

choices.name: Burn It All
choices.description: Combustion grants you 10% increased spell damage plus an additional 20% of your critical strike chance as spell damage.

nodes.name: Flame On
nodes.description: Fire Blast gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Pyroclasm
nodes.description:
Consuming Hot Streak has a 15% chance to make your next non-instant Pyroblast or Flamestrike cast within 15 seconds deal 230% additional damage.

Maximum 2 stacks.

nodes.name: Deep Impact
nodes.description: The enemy closest to the center of Meteor's impact takes 75% increased damage.

nodes.name: Fevered Incantation
nodes.description: Each consecutive critical strike you deal increases critical strike damage you deal by 1%, up to 4% for 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Meteor
nodes.description:
Calls down a meteor which lands at the target location after 3 seconds, dealing 108000 Fire damage to all enemies, and burns the ground, dealing 49920 Fire damage over 4 seconds to all enemies in the area.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Kindling
nodes.description: Combustion's cooldown is reduced by 60 seconds.

nodes.name: Fervent Flickering
nodes.description: Fire Blast gains 1 additional charge and its damage is increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Critical Mass
nodes.description:
Your spells have a 4% increased chance to deal a critical strike.

You gain 10% more of the Critical Strike stat from all sources.

nodes.name: From the Ashes
nodes.description:
Fire Blast damage increased by 15%.

Your direct damage spells reduce the cooldown of Fire Blast by 0.5 second.

nodes.name: Flame Accelerant
nodes.description: The cast time of Pyroblast and Flamestrike is reduced by 20%.

nodes.name: Master of Flame
nodes.description:
Ignite deals 15% more damage when Combustion is not active.

Fire Blast now spreads an additional 50% of your Ignite.

nodes.name: Fiery Rush
nodes.description: While Combustion is active, Fire Blast recharges 50% faster.

nodes.name: Cinderstorm
nodes.description: Casting Pyroblast or Flamestrike has a 8% chance to summon a storm of 5 cinders that pursue your target. Upon reaching your target, each cinder deals 24000 Fire damage, applies Ignite at 100% effectiveness, and spreads 50% of your Ignite to up to 1 nearby target.

nodes.name: Molten Fury
nodes.description: Damage dealt to targets below 30% health is increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Mote of Flame
nodes.description: All Fire damage dealt increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Blast Zone
nodes.description: Meteor's cooldown is reduced by 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Controlled Destruction
nodes.description: Damaging an enemy with Fireball, Pyroblast, or Flamestrike increases the damage it receives from Ignite by 0.2%. Stacks up to 50 times.

nodes.name: Intensifying Flame
nodes.description: While Ignite is on 3 or fewer enemies it flares up dealing an additional 30% of its damage to affected targets.

nodes.name: Cauterize
nodes.description:
Fatal damage instead brings you to 35% health and then burns you for 28% of your maximum health over 6 seconds.

While burning, movement slowing effects are suppressed and your movement speed is increased by 150%.

This effect cannot occur more than once every 6 minutes.

nodes.name: Wildfire
nodes.description: Fire Blast damage increased by 10% and it now spreads Ignite to 1 additional target.

nodes.name: Fuel the Fire
nodes.description:
Flamestrike has a chance equal to 100% of your spell critical strike chance to build up to a Hot Streak.

Flamestrike deals 5% increased damage for each enemy it damages, up to 25%.

nodes.name: Ignition
nodes.description:
Fire Blast now spreads 50% of your target's Ignite to 1 enemy.

Flamestrike applies 15% more Ignite.

nodes.name: Scald
nodes.description:
Fireball always critically strikes enemies below 30% health.

When Fireball or Scorch damage an enemy below 30% health, Fireball deals 25% increased damage and Scorch deals 250% increased damage.

choices.name: Flamestrike
choices.description:
Calls down a pillar of fire, burning all enemies within the area for 36000 Fire damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

choices.name: Flamestrike
choices.description:
Calls down a pillar of fire on your target, burning all enemies within the area for 36000 Fire damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

This spell is cast at your target.

nodes.name: Heat Shimmer
nodes.description: While Combustion is not active, damage from Ignite has a small chance to make your next Scorch instant, deal 100% increased damage, and deal damage as though your target was below 30% health.

nodes.name: Spontaneous Combustion
nodes.description: Casting Combustion refreshes up to 1 charge of Fire Blast.

nodes.name: Inflame
nodes.description: Hot Streak increases the amount of Ignite damage from Pyroblast or Flamestrike by an additional 25%.

nodes.name: Conflagration
nodes.description: Fire Blast deals 4800 additional Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Burnout
nodes.description: When Combustion expires, all of your active Ignites explode, dealing 75% of their remaining damage.

nodes.name: Pyromaniac
nodes.description:
Casting Pyroblast or Flamestrike while Hot Streak is active has a 6% chance to repeat the spell cast at 50% effectiveness.

This effect counts as consuming Hot Streak.

nodes.name: Firestarter
nodes.description: Your Fireball and Pyroblast spells always deal a critical strike when the target is above 90% health.

nodes.name: Scorch
nodes.description:
Scorches an enemy for 12000 Fire damage.

When cast on a target below 30% health, Scorch is a guaranteed critical strike.

Castable while moving.

ranks.description: Consuming Hot Streak has a 20% chance to grant you a stack of Fired Up, increasing your Fire damage by 4% for 12 seconds. Multiple applications may overlap.

Gaining Fired Up reduces the cooldown of Fire Blast by 2.5 seconds.

All Fire damage dealt is increased by 3%.

Combustion significantly increases your chance of gaining Fired Up, reducing each time you gain Fired Up.

Additionally Fired Up now extends Combustion's duration by 1 second.

nodes.name: Flash Freezeburn
nodes.description:
Meteor's damage is increased by 25%.

Meteor now grants Frostfire Empowerment.

choices.name: Elemental Affinity
choices.description: The cooldown of Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes is reduced by 30%.

choices.name: Flame and Frost
choices.description: Cauterize resets the cooldown of your Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes when it activates.

nodes.name: Dualcasting Adept
nodes.description:
Your Frost spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

Pyroblast damage increased by 15%.

Flamestrike damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Isothermic Core
nodes.description: Meteor now also calls down a Comet Storm, dealing 77952 Frost damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Frostfire Bolt
nodes.description: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing 29640 Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional 2472 Frostfire damage over 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Blast Radius
nodes.description:
Meteor damage increased by 20%.

Comet Storm damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Heat Sink
nodes.description: Fire Blast now deals Frostfire damage and its damage is increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Frostfire Infusion
nodes.description:
Frostfire Bolt's critical strike chance is increased by 15%..

The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%.

choices.name: Thermal Conditioning
choices.description: Frostfire Bolt's cast time is reduced by 10%.

choices.name: Severe Temperatures
choices.description: Frostfire Empowerment stacks 1 additional time and it causes Frostfire Bolt to explode for an additional 20% of its damage.

nodes.name: Frostfire Empowerment
nodes.description: Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

choices.name: Imbued Warding
choices.description: Blazing Barrier also casts an Ice Barrier at 25% effectiveness.

choices.name: Meltdown
choices.description:
You melt slightly out of your Ice Block and Ice Cold, allowing you to move slowly during Ice Block and increasing your movement speed over time.

Ice Block and Ice Cold trigger a Blazing Barrier when they end.

nodes.name: Elemental Conduit
nodes.description:
Comet Storm and Glacial Spike now apply Ignite.

Your Haste is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Molten Chill
nodes.description: Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite at 10% increased effectiveness.

nodes.name: Duality
nodes.description: Casting Pyroblast has a 20% chance to also cast a Glacial Spike, dealing 43948 Frost damage.

nodes.name: Frostfire Bolt
nodes.description: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing 29640 Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional 2472 Frostfire damage over 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Ashes of Inspiration
nodes.description:
When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it grants you Lesser Time Warp for 6 seconds.

Lesser Time Warp
Warp the flow of time, increasing your haste by 15%.

nodes.name: Burden of Power
nodes.description:
Pyroblast damage increased by 3%.

Flamestrike damage increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Codex of the Sunstriders
nodes.description:
When your Arcane Phoenix is summoned, it consumes all your Spellfire Spheres.

Each Sphere consumed increases your spell damage during Combustion by 2% and causes your Arcane Phoenix to cast an exceptional Arcane or Fire spell over its duration.

nodes.name: Memory of Al'ar
nodes.description:
During Combustion, you gain twice as many stacks of Mana Cascade.

When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it empowers you, granting Hyperthermia for 4 seconds.

Hyperthermia:
Pyroblast and Flamestrike have no cast time, are guaranteed to critically strike, and increase the damage of Pyroblast and Flamestrike by 15%.

nodes.name: Spellfire Spheres
nodes.description:
Consuming Hot Streak has a 12% chance to conjure a Spellfire Sphere.

While you're out of combat, you will slowly conjure Spellfire Spheres over time.

Spellfire Sphere
Increases your spell damage by 1%. Stacks up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Rondurmancy
nodes.description: Spellfire Spheres can now stack up to 5 times.

choices.name: Merely a Setback
choices.description:
The bonuses provided by your Barrier spells persist an additional 8 seconds after your Barrier is removed.

Additionally, Cauterize no longer deals damage to you.

choices.name: Time Twist
choices.description: The cooldown of Alter Time is reduced by 10 seconds.

choices.name: Savor the Moment
choices.description: When you cast Combustion, its duration is extended by 0.4 second for each Spellfire Sphere you have, up to 2 seconds.

choices.name: Sunfury Execution
choices.description: Pyroclasm's damage bonus is increased by 20% and Meteor grants Pyroclasm if talented.

choices.name: Lessons in Debilitation
choices.description: Your Arcane Phoenix has picked up a few tricks, and will Spellsteal when it is summoned and when it expires.

choices.name: Explosive Potential
choices.description: After casting Combustion, your next Blink will cause a Blast Wave at your previous location, dealing 6520 Fire damage, knocking enemies back 8 yds, and slowing them by 70% for 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Invocation: Arcane Phoenix
nodes.description:
When you cast Combustion, summon an Arcane Phoenix to aid you in battle.

Arcane Phoenix
Your Arcane Phoenix aids you for the duration of your Combustion, casting random Arcane and Fire spells.

nodes.name: Mana Cascade
nodes.description: Consuming Hot Streak grants you 0.5% Haste for 10 seconds1. Stacks up to 10 times. Multiple instances may overlap.

nodes.name: Spellfire Salvo
nodes.description:
Fire Blast cooldown reduced by 1 second.

Meteorite damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Pyrocosm
nodes.description:
Damage from Fireball has a 20% chance to summon a Meteorite.

When a Meteorite lands, the cooldown of Fire Blast is reduced by 0.5 second.

nodes.name: Glorious Incandescence
nodes.description:
Generating a Spellfire Sphere causes your next cast of Fire Blast to call down a storm of 4 Meteorites on its target.

Meteorite
Calls down a meteorite which lands at the target location after 3 seconds, dealing 12240 Fire damage to all enemies hit, reduced beyond 8 targets.

frost.description: Freezes enemies in their tracks and shatters them with Frost magic. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

left.name: Frostfire
left.description: Frostfire mages take the reins of seemingly incompatible elemental forces. By mastering the opposing forces, they enhance their elemental attacks and can even combine them for more power.

right.name: Spellslinger
right.description: Mastering the inherently unstable nature of magic allows Spellslingers to splinter their magic, creating powerful and volatile new effects.

nodes.name: Spellsteal
nodes.description: Steals a beneficial magic effect from the target. This effect lasts a maximum of 2 minutes.

nodes.name: Ice Cold
nodes.description: Ice Block now reduces all damage taken by 70% for 6 seconds but no longer grants Immunity, prevents movement, attacks, or casting spells. Does not incur the Global Cooldown.

nodes.name: Permafrost Bauble
nodes.description: The cooldown of Ice Block and Ice Cold are reduced by 30 seconds.

choices.name: Freezing Cold
choices.description:
Enemies hit by Cone of Cold are frozen in place for 5 seconds instead of snared.

When your roots expire or are dispelled, your target is snared by 80%, decaying over 3 seconds.

choices.name: Ice Nova
choices.description: Causes a whirl of icy wind around the enemy, dealing 16560 Frost damage to the target and all other enemies within 8 yds, freezing them in place for 2 seconds. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Ring of Frost
choices.description:
Summons a Ring of Frost for 10 seconds at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are incapacitated for 10 seconds. Limit 10 targets.

When the incapacitate expires, enemies are slowed by 65% for 4 seconds.

choices.name: Mass Polymorph
choices.description:
Transforms all enemies within 10 yards into sheep, wandering around incapacitated for 15 seconds. While affected, the victims cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters.

nodes.name: Barrier Diffusion
nodes.description: When your Barrier is removed, reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Mass Invisibility
nodes.description:
You and your allies within 40 yards instantly become invisible for 12 seconds. Taking any action will cancel the effect.



[Does not affect allies in combat.]

choices.name: Spatial Manipulation
choices.description: Blink gains an additional charge.

choices.name: Reflection
choices.description:
After casting Blink, it is replaced with Reflection for 8 seconds.

Reflection
Teleports you back to where you last Blinked. Castable while casting and unaffected by the global cooldown.

nodes.name: Flow of Time
nodes.description: The cooldowns of Blink and Shimmer are reduced by 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Tome of Antonidas
nodes.description: Increases Haste by 2%.

nodes.name: Energized Barriers
nodes.description: Casting your barrier removes all snare effects.

nodes.name: Master of Time
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Alter Time by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Quick Witted
nodes.description: Counterspell's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds.

choices.name: Shimmer
choices.description: Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way. Unaffected by the global cooldown and castable while casting.

choices.name: Improved Blink
choices.description: Blink's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Frost Conditioning
nodes.description: Hypothermia's duration is reduced by 10 seconds.

choices.name: Improved Frost Nova
choices.description: Frost Nova duration is increased by 2 seconds.

choices.name: Ice Ward
choices.description: Frost Nova now has 2 charges.

nodes.name: Incantation of Swiftness
nodes.description: Invisibility increases your movement speed by 20% for 6 seconds.

nodes.name: Arcane Warding
nodes.description: Reduces magic damage taken by 4%.

nodes.name: Alter Time
nodes.description: Alters the fabric of time, returning you to your current location and health when cast a second time, or after 10 seconds. Effect negated by long distance or death.

nodes.name: Remove Curse
nodes.description: Removes all Curses from a friendly target.

nodes.name: Ice Barrier
nodes.description:
Shields you with ice, absorbing 198000 damage for 60 seconds.

Melee attacks against you reduce the attacker's movement speed by 50%.

nodes.name: Ice Block
nodes.description:
Encases you in a block of ice, protecting you from all attacks and damage for 10 seconds, but during that time you cannot attack, move, or cast spells.

Causes Hypothermia, preventing you from recasting Ice Block for 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Winter's Protection
nodes.description: The cooldown of Ice Block is reduced by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Mirror Image
nodes.description:
Creates 3 copies of you nearby for 15 seconds, which cast spells and attack your enemies. While active, you generate significantly reduced threat.

Taking direct damage will cause one of your images to dissipate

nodes.name: Captured Thoughts
nodes.description: The duration of Brain Freeze is increased by 15 seconds.

nodes.name: Tome of Rhonin
nodes.description: Increases Critical Strike chance by 2%.

nodes.name: Time Manipulation
nodes.description: The cooldown of your loss of control spells are reduced by 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Greater Invisibility
nodes.description: Makes you invisible and untargetable for 20 seconds, removing all threat. Any action taken cancels this effect.

choices.name: Dragon's Breath
choices.description: Enemies in a 12 yd cone in front of you take 8038 Fire damage and are disoriented for 4 seconds. Damage will cancel the effect.

choices.name: Supernova
choices.description: Pulses arcane energy around the target enemy or ally, dealing 4140 Arcane damage to all enemies within 8 yds, and knocking them upward. A primary enemy target will take 100% increased damage.

choices.name: Time Walk
choices.description: Alter Time resets the cooldown of Blink and Shimmer when you return to your original location.

choices.name: Temporal Realignment
choices.description: Upon dropping below 25% health, your past self corrects your timeline, casting Alter Time and instantly returning 50% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Improved Ice Barrier
nodes.description: Ice Barrier reduces your physical damage taken by 10% and absorbs an additional 5% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Charm of Medivh
nodes.description: Your Mastery is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Charm of Aegwynn
nodes.description: The critical strike damage of your spells is  increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Master of Escape
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Invisibility by 60 seconds.

nodes.name: Inspired Intellect
nodes.description: Arcane Intellect grants you an additional 2% Intellect.

nodes.name: Overflowing Energy
nodes.description:
Each time your Frostbolt fails to critically strike, it gains 10% increased critical strike chance.

Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes.

nodes.name: Improved Conjuration
nodes.description: Mirror Image's cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Improved Remove Curse
nodes.description: Casting Remove Curse on a friendly target also casts it on yourself, but its cooldown is increased by 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Improved Counterspell
nodes.description: Counterspell prevents casting for an additional 1 second.

nodes.name: Mana Confluence
nodes.description: Your mana costs are reduced by 5%.

nodes.name: Brainstorm
nodes.description: Gaining Brain Freeze increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 seconds. Multiple instances may overlap.

nodes.name: Improved Spellsteal
nodes.description: Spellsteal repeats its effect after 4 seconds, but it now has a cooldown of 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Winter's Blessing
nodes.description:
Your Haste is increased by 3%.

You gain 5% more Haste from all sources of Haste.

nodes.name: Fractured Frost
nodes.description: Ice Lance strikes 1 additional target at 100% effectiveness, preferring enemies with more stacks of Freezing.

nodes.name: Ray of Frost
nodes.description:
Channel an icy beam at the enemy for 4 seconds, dealing 54000 Frost damage every 0.5 second.

Applies 8 stacks of Freezing over its duration.

nodes.name: Frostbite
nodes.description:
When Frostbolt critically strikes, it applies 1 additional stack of Freezing.

Each stack of Freezing that you Shatter deals 2700 damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Splitting Ice
nodes.description: Your Flurry and Frostbolt spells strike 1 additional target at 80% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Fingers of Frost
nodes.description:
Frostbolt has a 15% chance to grant a charge of Fingers of Frost.

Fingers of Frost causes your next Ice Lance to deal Shatter damage equal to 4 stacks of Freezing and does not consume Freezing stacks.

Maximum 2 charges.

nodes.name: Permafrost Lances
nodes.description: Frozen Orb increases Shatter's damage by 10% for its duration.

choices.name: Wintertide
choices.description: Frozen Orb has a 100% chance to grant Brain Freeze.

choices.name: White Out
choices.description: Ice Lance reduces the cooldown of Frozen Orb by 0.5 sec, increased by 0.1 second for each stack of Freezing Shattered.

nodes.name: Cone of Frost
nodes.description: Cone of Cold now applies 3 stacks of Freezing to up to 5 enemies.

nodes.name: Ice Lance
nodes.description:
Quickly fling a shard of ice at the target, dealing 22050 Frost damage.

Shatters 4 stacks of Freezing.

nodes.name: Frozen Orb
nodes.description:
Launches an orb of swirling ice in front of you, dealing up to 162202 Frost damage to all enemies it passes through over 15 seconds. After a short delay, Frozen Orb will pursue its target. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Enemies damaged by the Frozen Orb are slowed by 50% for 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Flurry
nodes.description:
Unleash a flurry of ice, striking the target 3 times for a total of 46267 Frost damage.

Applies 3 stacks of Freezing.

nodes.name: Brain Freeze
nodes.description: Frostbolt has a 25% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Flurry and cause your next Flurry to deal 50% increased damage.

nodes.name: Frozen Touch
nodes.description: Frostbolt grants you Fingers of Frost 25% more often and Brain Freeze 20% more often.

nodes.name: Piercing Cold
nodes.description: Frostbolt and Flurry critical strike damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Thermal Void
nodes.description: Consuming Brain Freeze has a 100% chance to cause your next Ice Lance to Shatter 4 additional stacks of Freezing.

nodes.name: Glaciate
nodes.description: When Ice Lance Shatters a stack of Freezing, the cooldown of Ray of Frost is reduced by 0.1 second.

nodes.name: Comet Storm
nodes.description:
Casting Ray of Frost replaces your Ray of Frost with Comet Storm, calling down a series of 7 icy comets on and around the target, that deals up to 72240 Frost damage to all enemies within 8 yds of its impacts.

Each Comet Shatters 1 stack of Freezing.

nodes.name: Everlasting Frost
nodes.description:
Casting Frozen Orb grants 1 stack of Fingers of Frost.

Damaging one or more enemies with Frozen Orb has a 3% chance to grant Fingers of Frost.

choices.name: Splintering Ray
choices.description: Ray of Frost deals 30% of its damage to 5 nearby enemies.

choices.name: Frigid Focus
choices.description: Ray of Frost damage increased by 30%.

choices.name: Cold Snap
choices.description: Resets the cooldown of your Ice Barrier, Frost Nova, Cone of Cold, Ice Cold, and Ice Block.

choices.name: Glacial Bulwark
choices.description: Ice Block and Ice Barrier now have an additional charge.

nodes.name: Glacial Assault
nodes.description:
Flurry has a 12% chance each hit to call down an icy comet, crashing into your target and nearby enemies for 18000 Frost damage.

Applies 1 stack of Freezing.

choices.name: Summon Water Elemental
choices.description: Summons a Water Elemental to follow and fight for you.

choices.name: Lonely Winter
choices.description: Spell damage increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Flash Freeze
nodes.description: Casting Glacial Spike has a 100% chance to grant you Fingers of Frost.

nodes.name: Rimecaster
nodes.description: Frostbolt and Glacial Spike damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Freezing Winds
nodes.description: Shattering enemies inside your Blizzard increases Shatter's area damage by 15%.

nodes.name: Improved Flurry
nodes.description: Flurry fires 1 additional missile.

nodes.name: Hailstones
nodes.description: The time it takes to generate an Icicle is reduced by 1 second.

nodes.name: Glacial Attunement
nodes.description: Flurry and Blizzard damage increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Improved Shatter
nodes.description: Shatter damage has a 50% increased chance to critically strike.

nodes.name: Freezing Rain
nodes.description:
Frozen Orb makes Blizzard instant cast.

Blizzard damage increased by 20%.

choices.name: Glacial Chill
choices.description: Glacial Spike deals 5% increased damage and applies 2 additional stacks of Freezing.

choices.name: Glacial Shatter
choices.description: Glacial Spike no longer applies Freezing, and instead Shatters 5 stacks of Freezing.

choices.name: Blizzard
choices.description:
Ice shards pelt the target area, dealing 42509 Frost damage over 12 seconds and reducing movement speed by 50% for 3 seconds.

This spell is cast at a selected location

choices.name: Blizzard
choices.description:
Ice shards pelt the target area, dealing 42509 Frost damage over 12 seconds and reducing movement speed by 50% for 3 seconds.

This spell is cast at your target.

nodes.name: Icicles
nodes.description:
While in combat, Frost crystallizes around you, generating an Icicle every 6 seconds. Upon generating 5 Icicles, Frostbolt upgrades to Glacial Spike for its next cast.

Glacial Spike
Conjures a massive spike of ice that impales your target, dealing 156000 damage and slowing the target's movement speed by 50% for 8 seconds.

Applies 3 stacks of Freezing.

nodes.name: Heart of Ice
nodes.description: Ice Lance Shatters 1 additional stack of Freezing.

nodes.name: Deep Shatter
nodes.description: Shatter's critical strike damage is increased by 50% of your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Crystalline Refraction
nodes.description: Ray of Frost generates 2 stacks of Fingers of Frost over its duration.

ranks.description: Shattering an enemy has a 10% chance to summon a Hand of Frost to pursue your target, dealing 60000 Frost damage and applying 1 stack of Freezing on contact.

Each stack of Freezing you Shatter increases your chance to summon a Hand of Frost by an additional 1%.

Damage from Hand of Frost increases your spell damage by 1% for 8 seconds. Multiple applications may overlap.

Ray of Frost summons 4 Hands of Frost over its duration.

Ray of Frost gains an additional charge and its damage is increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Flash Freezeburn
nodes.description:
Glacial Spike damage increased by 15% and it now explodes on impact, dealing 25% of its damage to up to 5 nearby enemies.

Additionally, Glacial Spike now grants Frostfire Empowerment.

choices.name: Elemental Affinity
choices.description: The cooldown of Fire spells is reduced by 30%.

choices.name: Flame and Frost
choices.description: Ice Block and Ice Cold reset the cooldowns of your Fire spells.

nodes.name: Dualcasting Adept
nodes.description:
Your Fire spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

Shatter damage increased by 15%.

Blizzard damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Isothermic Core
nodes.description:
Comet Storm now also calls down a Meteor, dealing 108000 Fire damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Damage from Meteor Shatters 1 stacks of Freezing.

nodes.name: Frostfire Bolt
nodes.description: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing 29640 Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional 2472 Frostfire damage over 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Blast Radius
nodes.description:
Comet Storm damage increased by 20%.

Meteor damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Heat Sink
nodes.description: Flurry now deals Frostfire damage and its damage is increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Frostfire Infusion
nodes.description:
Frostfire Bolt has an additional 5% chance to grant Brain Freeze.

The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%.

choices.name: Thermal Conditioning
choices.description: Frostfire Bolt's cast time is reduced by 10%.

choices.name: Severe Temperatures
choices.description: Frostfire Empowerment stacks 1 additional time and it causes Frostfire Bolt to explode for an additional 20% of its damage.

nodes.name: Frostfire Empowerment
nodes.description:
Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Damage from Frostfire Empowerment applies 1 stack of Freezing.

choices.name: Imbued Warding
choices.description: Ice Barrier also casts a Blazing Barrier at 25% effectiveness.

choices.name: Meltdown
choices.description:
You melt slightly out of your Ice Block and Ice Cold, allowing you to move slowly during Ice Block and increasing your movement speed over time.

Ice Block and Ice Cold trigger a Blazing Barrier when they end.

nodes.name: Elemental Conduit
nodes.description:
Meteor and Pyroblast now apply Ignite.

Your Haste is increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Molten Chill
nodes.description: Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite, dealing an additional 30% of their damage over 9 seconds.

nodes.name: Duality
nodes.description: Casting Glacial Spike also casts a Pyroblast, dealing 84600 Fire damage.

nodes.name: Frostfire Bolt
nodes.description: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing 29640 Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional 2472 Frostfire damage over 8 seconds.

nodes.name: Splinterstorm
nodes.description:
Each time Ray of Frost damages one or more enemies, it generates 1 Frost Splinter.

For 10 seconds after casting Ray of Frost, your chance to conjure an additional Frost Splinter is increased to 100%.

nodes.name: Spellfrost Teachings
nodes.description: Direct damage from Frost Splinters reduces the cooldown of Frozen Orb by 0.25 second.

nodes.name: Controlled Instincts
nodes.description: 60% of the direct damage dealt by a Frost Splinter is also dealt to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Signature Spell
nodes.description:
Frostbolt and Blizzard damage increased by 25%.

Glacial Spike conjures 2 additional Frost Splinters.

nodes.name: Archmage's Wrath
nodes.description:
Ray of Frost damage increased by 20%.

Your chance to gain Brain Freeze from Frostbolt is increased by 5%.

choices.name: Slippery Slinging
choices.description: You have 40% increased movement speed during Alter Time.

choices.name: Look Again
choices.description: While in combat, Blink summons a Mirror Image at your previous location.

choices.name: Reactive Barrier
choices.description:
Your Ice Barrier can absorb up to 25% more damage based on your missing Health.

Max effectiveness when under 25% health.

choices.name: Phantasmal Image
choices.description: Your Mirror Image summons 1 extra clone.

nodes.name: Splintering Orbs
nodes.description:
Enemies damaged by your Frozen Orb conjure 1 Frost Splinter, up to 4.

Frozen Orb damage is increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Augury Abounds
nodes.description: Conjuring one or more Frost Splinters has a 10% chance to conjure a burst of 8 Frost Splinters.

nodes.name: Force of Will
nodes.description: Ice Lance conjures a Frost Splinter for every 2 Freezing stacks Shattered from its primary target.

nodes.name: Splintering Sorcery
nodes.description:
Casting Frostbolt or Flurry conjures a Frost Splinter.

[
Frost Splinter:
Conjure raw Frost magic into a sharp projectile that deals 5436 Frost damage.
]

nodes.name: Polished Focus
nodes.description:
Ice Lance Shatters 1 additional stack of Freezing.

Shatter damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Infused Splinters
nodes.description: Direct damage from Frost Splinters have a 15% chance to apply 1 stack of Freezing.

choices.name: Attuned Familiar
choices.description: Your Water Elemental has a 50% chance to conjure a Splinter alongside its Waterbolt.

choices.name: Shifting Shards
choices.description: Gaining Brain Freeze conjures 2 Frost Splinters.
